testcase.name: invalidLocalEndsWithInvalidChar

testcase.name: idn_not_allowed
testcase.system-out: 15:53:25.876 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- Label contém caracteres inválidos: bücher

testcase.name: invalidLabelTooLong
testcase.system-out: 15:53:25.878 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- Label inválida: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

testcase.name: local_too_long
testcase.system-out: 15:53:25.879 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, tamanho incorreto: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx@example.com

testcase.name: invalidDomainTooLong
testcase.system-out: 15:53:25.881 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, tamanho incorreto: user@aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

testcase.name: invalidEmptyLabel
testcase.system-out: 15:53:25.882 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, contém pontos consecutivos: user@exa..mple.com

testcase.name: label_too_long
testcase.system-out: 15:53:25.883 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- Label inválida: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

testcase.name: should_reject_basic_invalids(String, boolean)[1]
testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.011 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail nulo não é válido.

testcase.name: should_reject_basic_invalids(String, boolean)[2]
testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.017 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail vazio não é válido.

testcase.name: should_reject_basic_invalids(String, boolean)[3]
testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.018 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, problema com '@': no-at-domain

testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.020 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, problema com '@': @domain.com

testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.021 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, problema com '@': user@

testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.021 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, problema com '@': a@@b.com

testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.023 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, contém pontos consecutivos: a..b@c.com

testcase.name: should_reject_basic_invalids(String, boolean)[8]
testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.024 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, contém pontos consecutivos: ab@c..com

testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.025 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- Local-part começa ou termina com caractere inválido: .abc

testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.026 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- Local-part começa ou termina com caractere inválido: abc.

testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.028 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- E-mail inválido, tamanho incorreto: a@b

testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.029 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- Label contém caracteres inválidos: -abc

testcase.name: should_reject_basic_invalids(String, boolean)[13]
testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.030 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- Label contém caracteres inválidos: abc-

testcase.name: should_reject_basic_invalids(String, boolean)[14]
testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.032 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- TLD inválido: c

testcase.name: should_reject_basic_invalids(String, boolean)[15]
testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.033 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- TLD inválido: 123

testcase.name: should_reject_basic_invalids(String, boolean)[16]
testcase.system-out: 15:53:26.034 [main] WARN br.com.ramiralvesmelo.util.email.EmailUtil -- Local-part inválida: 'a

testcase.name: idn_invalid_label
